subcodes.first_line: O ye supporters of 'Abdu'l-Bahá! Bukhárá was once a place that enhanced wisdom, a center of learning and knowledge where souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاوران عبدالبهاء بخارا وقتی عقل افزا بود و مرکز علم و دانش نفوسی در آنجا
subcodes.subjects: @love and unity, @praise of Eastern values; culture, @prejudice; racial prejudice; class distinction, @non-participation in politics
